programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.
programme.desc: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP02: EZRI KONSA
programme.sub-title: This week on The Big Interview, Aston Villa’s Ezri Konsa sits down to talk about his side’s rise under Unai Emery and what the Premier League can expect from them this season. Following a runners-up place at Euro 2024 with England, Konsa opens up on his upbringing and how playing football steered him on a path away from some of the darker sides of life in London.
programme.desc: This week on The Big Interview, Aston Villa’s Ezri Konsa sits down to talk about his side’s rise under Unai Emery and what the Premier League can expect from them this season. Following a runners-up place at Euro 2024 with England, Konsa opens up on his upbringing and how playing football steered him on a path away from some of the darker sides of life in London.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP03: MATTHIJS DE LIGT
programme.sub-title: Manchester United’s new signing, Matthijs de Ligt joins The Big Interview this week to talk about his footballing journey that has led him to the Premier League. The former Bayern Munich and Juventus defender sits down with Steve Bower to discuss growing up in an Ajax-loving household, his time in Germany and Italy and his delight at joining the Old Trafford side.
programme.desc: Manchester United’s new signing, Matthijs de Ligt joins The Big Interview this week to talk about his footballing journey that has led him to the Premier League. The former Bayern Munich and Juventus defender sits down with Steve Bower to discuss growing up in an Ajax-loving household, his time in Germany and Italy and his delight at joining the Old Trafford side.

programme.sub-title: Paul Scholes looks back on his outstanding career as he selects his personal top ten Premier League moments.
programme.desc: Paul Scholes looks back on his outstanding career as he selects his personal top ten Premier League moments.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP01: LEICESTER CITY 15/16
programme.sub-title: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.
programme.desc: Former Leicester City stars Wes Morgan and Marc Albrighton explain the key moments in a Premier League season that stunned the world.

programme.title: MY SEASON JAMIE VARDY: 15/16
programme.sub-title: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Jamie Vardy who excelled in 2015/2016. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Vardy and Leicester City.
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Jamie Vardy who excelled in 2015/2016. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Vardy and Leicester City.

programme.title: MY SEASON EDEN HAZARD: 14/15
programme.sub-title: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Eden Hazard who excelled in 2014/2015. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Hazard and Chelsea.
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Eden Hazard who excelled in 2014/2015. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both Hazard and Chelsea.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.
programme.desc: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP13: (Subbed) SVEN-GORAN ERIKSSON
programme.sub-title: This week PL Stories takes an emotional walk through the life of one of football's most charismatic men. On the 26th August 2024 Sven-Göran Eriksson sadly lost his fight against pancreatic cancer. We look back at the fascinating life of the first foreign England manager: a man who took semi-professional side Gothenburg to European glory, before winning countless titles across Europe, leaving an indelible mark on all who he met.
programme.desc: This week PL Stories takes an emotional walk through the life of one of football's most charismatic men. On the 26th August 2024 Sven-Göran Eriksson sadly lost his fight against pancreatic cancer. We look back at the fascinating life of the first foreign England manager: a man who took semi-professional side Gothenburg to European glory, before winning countless titles across Europe, leaving an indelible mark on all who he met.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP06: THE ENTERTAINERS
programme.sub-title: Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.
programme.desc: Nicknamed ‘The Entertainers’, Kevin Keegan’s Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.sub-title: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP02: WOL v TOT 23/24
programme.sub-title: In 2023/24, Wolves completed a Premier League double over Tottenham Hotspur - including a breathtaking comeback victory at Molineux. Gary O'Neil, Mario Lemina and Tommy Doyle relive the key moments from their Spurs double salvo.
programme.desc: In 2023/24, Wolves completed a Premier League double over Tottenham Hotspur - including a breathtaking comeback victory at Molineux. Gary O'Neil, Mario Lemina and Tommy Doyle relive the key moments from their Spurs double salvo.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP01: PAUL SCHOLES - MY GREATEST RIVALRY
programme.sub-title: One of the greatest players of his generation revisits some of the iconic Manchester United v Liverpool clashes that he was a part of. We hear the stories behind the images from the greatest rivalry in English football, with Scholes reminiscing about the many battles he fought in the middle of the park against Steven Gerrard.
programme.desc: One of the greatest players of his generation revisits some of the iconic Manchester United v Liverpool clashes that he was a part of. We hear the stories behind the images from the greatest rivalry in English football, with Scholes reminiscing about the many battles he fought in the middle of the park against Steven Gerrard.

programme.sub-title: Manchester United legend Gary Neville in conversation with Paul Scholes, as they watch through some of the most compelling matches they played in.

programme.title: GARY NEVILLE'S SOCCERBOX - Series 4 DAVID GINOLA
programme.sub-title: Premier League superstars sit down with former Manchester United legend Gary Neville to look back at some of the defining moments from their careers. Conversational, relaxed and intimate each 26 minute show is an entertaining blend of archive, anecdote and insight.
programme.desc: Premier League superstars sit down with former Manchester United legend Gary Neville to look back at some of the defining moments from their careers. Conversational, relaxed and intimate each 26 minute show is an entertaining blend of archive, anecdote and insight.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP02: ASHLEY COLE HALL OF FAME SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: With 3 Premier League titles, Ashley Cole is widely regarded as one of the best defenders to have played in the League. We sit down with the Englishman to discuss the moments that made him a legend and helped him rightly earn his place in the Premier League Hall of Fame.
programme.desc: With 3 Premier League titles, Ashley Cole is widely regarded as one of the best defenders to have played in the League. We sit down with the Englishman to discuss the moments that made him a legend and helped him rightly earn his place in the Premier League Hall of Fame.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP04: JOHN TERRY HALL OF FAME SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Considered a legend at Stamford Bridge, John Terry won no fewer than five League titles at Chelsea as well as lifting the F.A. Cup five times and the Champions League trophy. We find out what set him apart from his peers and where he rates amongst the very best in the World.
programme.desc: Considered a legend at Stamford Bridge, John Terry won no fewer than five League titles at Chelsea as well as lifting the F.A. Cup five times and the Champions League trophy. We find out what set him apart from his peers and where he rates amongst the very best in the World.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP48: HALL OF FAME 2024 INDUCTEES
programme.sub-title: We head to London to go behind the scenes at the Premier League Hall of fame event night and meet the three newest inductees to secure their place amongst English footballs elite!

programme.title: PL STORIES EP50: (Subbed) ANGE POSTECOGLOU
programme.sub-title: From humble beginnings as a footballer in Melbourne to becoming Tottenham’s manager, we chart the meteoric rise of Australian Ange Postecoglou. We speak to those that knew him best to find out what makes him tick and delve into his unique coaching style that has brought him success wherever he’s been.
programme.desc: From humble beginnings as a footballer in Melbourne to becoming Tottenham’s manager, we chart the meteoric rise of Australian Ange Postecoglou. We speak to those that knew him best to find out what makes him tick and delve into his unique coaching style that has brought him success wherever he’s been.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: JARRED GILLETT - THROUGH THE EYES OF A REFEREE
programme.sub-title: Jarred Gillett made history earlier this year when he became the first Premier League referee ever to be fitted with a special head-mounted camera during Crystal Palace’s home victory over Manchester United. PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level. Premier League match officials and in particular referees are often the most scrutinised individuals in the game and this show reveals how difficult a task they have.
programme.desc: Jarred Gillett made history earlier this year when he became the first Premier League referee ever to be fitted with a special head-mounted camera during Crystal Palace’s home victory over Manchester United. PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level. Premier League match officials and in particular referees are often the most scrutinised individuals in the game and this show reveals how difficult a task they have.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP14: (Subbed) NEMANJA VIDIC
programme.sub-title: Nemanja Vidić grew up in war-torn Serbia and went on to become one of the greatest defenders in English football. PL Stories sits down with him to explore his journey from Belgrade to Manchester. We also hear from former coaches and players about how his childhood shaped him into the person he is today and his lasting impact on the Premier League.
programme.desc: Nemanja Vidić grew up in war-torn Serbia and went on to become one of the greatest defenders in English football. PL Stories sits down with him to explore his journey from Belgrade to Manchester. We also hear from former coaches and players about how his childhood shaped him into the person he is today and his lasting impact on the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP49: BILL FOLEY
programme.sub-title: Upon creating an American Ice Hockey team, owner Bill Foley outlandlishly claimed his team would lift the Stanley Cup in six years. His dream came true. Now, owner of AFC Bournemouth and flying in the Premier League, he’s already making bold claims for the Cherries’ future.
programme.desc: Upon creating an American Ice Hockey team, owner Bill Foley outlandlishly claimed his team would lift the Stanley Cup in six years. His dream came true. Now, owner of AFC Bournemouth and flying in the Premier League, he’s already making bold claims for the Cherries’ future.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP39: KICKS AND CULTURE STATESIDE
programme.sub-title: The Premier League is seeing a big boost in popularity amongst the Black American population and we travelled Stateside to learn more about this growing appeal. The show is led by Aaron Dolores, football fan and founder of Black Arrow, a creative movement on a quest to promote the intersection of football and black culture, not just in the US but worldwide. He takes us on a journey where we meet varying characters from the Mayor of Birmingham Alabama, Randall Woodfin, former players Tim Howard and Jozy Altidore, to current player Chris Richards as well as authentic Black American fans immersed in Premier League culture.
programme.desc: The Premier League is seeing a big boost in popularity amongst the Black American population and we travelled Stateside to learn more about this growing appeal. programme.title: PL STORIES EP35: AFRICAN ICONS IN THE PREMIER LEAGUE
programme.sub-title: We discover the impact that African players have had on the Premier League. We hear from the key figures as we track the growth of African influence: from the trail blazers in the early 90s; the Champions who have lifted the Premier League trophy; the modern greats such as Mane, Salah and Mahrez who have set new standards for African footballers; right up to the players who are leaving their mark in the Premier League this season, making Africa’s influence greater than ever before.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: JARRED GILLETT - THROUGH THE EYES OF A REFEREE
programme.sub-title: Jarred Gillett made history earlier this year when he became the first Premier League referee ever to be fitted with a special head-mounted camera during Crystal Palace’s home victory over Manchester United. PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level. Premier League match officials and in particular referees are often the most scrutinised individuals in the game and this show reveals how difficult a task they have.
programme.desc: Jarred Gillett made history earlier this year when he became the first Premier League referee ever to be fitted with a special head-mounted camera during Crystal Palace’s home victory over Manchester United. PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level. Premier League match officials and in particular referees are often the most scrutinised individuals in the game and this show reveals how difficult a task they have.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP12: MARK BOSNICH
programme.sub-title: He was Villa’s penalty saving hero in the 90s and the man tasked by Fergie to replace the legendary Peter Schmeichel at Manchester United. Former Australian number one, Mark Bosnich welcomes PL Stories down under as he reflects on his career in England’s top-flight.
programme.desc: He was Villa’s penalty saving hero in the 90s and the man tasked by Fergie to replace the legendary Peter Schmeichel at Manchester United. Former Australian number one, Mark Bosnich welcomes PL Stories down under as he reflects on his career in England’s top-flight.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP29: MIKEL JOHN OBI
programme.sub-title: Having risen from the bustling streets of Nigeria to the pinnacle of professional football in England, Mikel John Obi’s story is a remarkable journey that’s seen him win 2 Premier Leagues, F.A. Cup titles, European trophies and an Africa Cup of nations. We get under the skin of the Nigerian as he opens up on the challenges of fame and fortune and lifts the lid on each of the managers he worked with at Chelsea.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP15: TIM CAHILL
programme.sub-title: With over 200 appearances for Everton, Tim Cahill established himself as the high-energy midfielder who helped drive the side. For PL Stories this week, Cahill talks through his journey to the Premier League from battling his way to make it as a footballer in his native Australia, leaving home as a teenager and adapting to English life, scoring in a World Cup as well as the difficult decision to leave Goodison Park after 8 years.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP12: MARK BOSNICH
programme.sub-title: He was Villa’s penalty saving hero in the 90s and the man tasked by Fergie to replace the legendary Peter Schmeichel at Manchester United. Former Australian number one, Mark Bosnich welcomes PL Stories down under as he reflects on his career in England’s top-flight.
programme.desc: He was Villa’s penalty saving hero in the 90s and the man tasked by Fergie to replace the legendary Peter Schmeichel at Manchester United. Former Australian number one, Mark Bosnich welcomes PL Stories down under as he reflects on his career in England’s top-flight.

programme.sub-title: Manchester United’s new signing, Matthijs de Ligt joins The Big Interview this week to talk about his footballing journey that has led him to the Premier League. programme.title: PL STORIES EP49: BILL FOLEY

programme.sub-title: From humble beginnings as a footballer in Melbourne to becoming Tottenham’s manager, we chart the meteoric rise of Australian Ange Postecoglou. We speak to those that knew him best to find out what makes him tick and delve into his unique coaching style that has brought him success wherever he’s been.

programme.sub-title: Starting out at Arsenal, Stephy Mavididi had all the attributes to go to the very top of the game. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP04: JOHN BARNES
programme.sub-title: Growing up in a middle-class, military family in Jamaica, John Barnes moved to England as a 12-year-old, where he was later scouted by Watford. A key player in the Liverpool side involved in the inception of the Premier League, Barnes gives his thoughts to The Big Interview on his own stellar career, how the league has changed over the past 32 years and why the number 10 role that he often occupied isn’t as prominent as it used to be.
programme.desc: Growing up in a middle-class, military family in Jamaica, John Barnes moved to England as a 12-year-old, where he was later scouted by Watford. programme.title: PL STORIES EP15: TIM CAHILL
programme.sub-title: With over 200 appearances for Everton, Tim Cahill established himself as the high-energy midfielder who helped drive the side. For PL Stories this week, Cahill talks through his journey to the Premier League from battling his way to make it as a footballer in his native Australia, leaving home as a teenager and adapting to English life, scoring in a World Cup as well as the difficult decision to leave Goodison Park after 8 years.
programme.desc: With over 200 appearances for Everton, Tim Cahill established himself as the high-energy midfielder who helped drive the side. programme.title: MATCHDAY LIVE Southampton v Manchester United / Liverpool v Nottingham Forest (Goal Rush) / Aston Villa v Everton / Bournemouth v Chelsea
programme.sub-title: A bumper Premier League Saturday begins with Southampton hosting Manchester United. Michael Owen and Karen Carney will analyse that game at St Mary’s plus Liverpool v Nottingham Forest headlining Goal Rush. That’s followed by two late matches with Aston Villa taking on Everton and Chelsea travelling to Bournemouth in the company of Leon Osman and Gary Cahill.
programme.desc: A bumper Premier League Saturday begins with Southampton hosting Manchester United.
